process.commandLine: V=/mnt/c/wslcmask; if cat "$V/visible/control.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q VISIBLE_SECRET; then echo VISIBLE_OK; else echo VISIBLE_MISSING; fi; if cat "$V/secret_file.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q FILE_SECRET; then echo FILE_LEAK; else echo FILE_MASKED_OK; fi; if ls "$V/secret_dir" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo DIR_LEAK; else echo DIR_MASKED_OK; fi
